curriculumWeek1.title: Curriculum Week 1

openCourt.title: The Mice Who Lived in a Shoe

Monday.readingFocus: Introduce the weekly selection, essential question, vocabulary, and first reading.
Monday.writingFocus: Introduce the first formal writing routine and establish success criteria.
Monday.scienceFocus: Begin the selected science unit with a phenomenon or observation.
Monday.socialStudiesFocus: Begin the selected civics or community lesson.

Tuesday.readingFocus: Reread and discuss key details, vocabulary, and comprehension.
Tuesday.writingFocus: Model planning and oral rehearsal before writing.

Wednesday.readingFocus: Use text evidence and practice the weekly comprehension skill.
Wednesday.writingFocus: Guide students through drafting and elaboration.
Wednesday.socialStudiesFocus: Use a source, image, map, or text to answer the lesson question.

Thursday.readingFocus: Reread for fluency, vocabulary, and deeper understanding.
Thursday.writingFocus: Revise or edit using the weekly writing and GUM focus.
Thursday.scienceFocus: Complete the investigation or notebook response.
Thursday.socialStudiesFocus: Complete the guided or independent student task.

Friday.readingFocus: Review the weekly selection and complete approved weekly assessments.
Friday.writingFocus: Complete, share, or assess the weekly writing task.
Friday.scienceFocus: Complete a science quick check or reflection.
Friday.socialStudiesFocus: Complete a social studies quick check or reflection.

curriculumWeek1.defaultSupports: Visuals and gestures; picture-word cards; oral rehearsal; sentence frames; partner support; chunked directions; graphic organizers; manipulatives; visual timers; oral-response options; approved IEP and 504 accommodations.

stages.title: 1. Assign Curriculum
stages.description: Choose the week and assign the curriculum sequence.

stages.title: 2. Build Weekly Plans
stages.description: Review the five-day plan and complete the instructional details.

stages.title: 3. Gather Attachments
stages.description: Link authorized resources and mark printing needs.

stages.title: 4. Build Daily Packets
stages.description: Prepare daily lesson packets and the print queue.

stages.title: 5. Teach the Day
stages.description: Open the live schedule and advance through the day.

steps.title: Select Week
steps.description: Choose a week from Teacher Intelligence.

steps.title: Build Weekly Plan
steps.description: Create a five-day planning record from the selected assignment.

steps.title: Build Print Queue
steps.description: Add weekly print and preparation tasks.
